title: Recession risk
subtitle: Leading and coincident indicators of an economic downturn.

indicators.name: Yield Curve (10yr - 3mo)
indicators.threshold: Below zero = watch. Within 12 months after a sustained inversion (at least 60 consecutive daily observations below zero) ends = elevated. Otherwise benign. Navigo-chosen parameters, pending confirmation.
indicators.notes: The spread is positive (+0.63) and no sustained inversion ended within the trailing 12 months. Series identity verified against two independent sources on 2026-07-02 (see VERIFICATION.md). History file: data/history/t10y3m.json.
